hooks.command: echo KB/Wiki vNext: use the vnext-session-start plugin command when exposed. In a shell, resolve the runtime at .kb-next/runtime/kb_next.py or the plugin-bundled runtime/kb_next.py or core/versions/kb-wiki-vnext/runtime/kb_next.py and run python resolved-runtime-path session-start --json, else run classic python .kb/kb.py lifecycle session-start --json. Then read only .kb-next/memory/NOW.md by default.
